 now apply t_sub_sub.
Qed.


őď1, őď2, őď3, őď4: t_ctx
u: őď1 =[ val ]> őď2
v: őď2 =[ val ]> őď3
w: őď3 =[ val ]> őď4
(u ‚äõ v) ‚äõ w ‚Č°‚āź u ‚äõ (v ‚äõ w)

  intros ? i; unfold a_comp; now apply v_sub_sub.
Qed.

Definition t_sub_id_l_P őď A (t : term őď A) : Prop := t `‚āú‚äõ Var = t.
Definition w_sub_id_l_P őď A (v : whn őď A) : Prop := v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v.
Definition s_sub_id_l_P őď (s : state őď) : Prop := s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s.


syn_ind_args t_sub_id_l_P w_sub_id_l_P s_sub_id_l_P

  
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) s -> t_sub_id_l_P őď ‚ÜĎ A (Mu s)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
w_sub_id_l_P őď A v -> t_sub_id_l_P őď ‚ÜĎ A (Val v)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (i : őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A),
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ A (VarR i)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) s ->
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ A (MuT s)
forall őď : t_ctx, t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ `0 Boom
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
w_sub_id_l_P őď A v ->
forall k : term őď ¬¨ B,
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ B k ->
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ (A `‚Üí B) (App v k)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (k : term őď ¬¨ A),
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ A k ->
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ (A `√ó B) (Fst k)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (k : term őď ¬¨ B),
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ B k ->
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ (A `√ó B) (Snd k)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) s ->
forall t : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B) t ->
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ (A `+ B) (Case s t)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (i : őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ A),
w_sub_id_l_P őď A (VarL i)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
w_sub_id_l_P őď A v -> w_sub_id_l_P őď (A `+ B) (Inl v)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď B),
w_sub_id_l_P őď B v -> w_sub_id_l_P őď (A `+ B) (Inr v)
forall őď : t_ctx, w_sub_id_l_P őď `1 Tt
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) s ->
w_sub_id_l_P őď (A `‚Üí B) (Lam s)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) s ->
forall t : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B),
s_sub_id_l_P (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) t ->
w_sub_id_l_P őď (A `√ó B) (Pair s t)
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (u : term őď ‚ÜĎ A),
t_sub_id_l_P őď ‚ÜĎ A u ->
forall v : term őď ¬¨ A,
t_sub_id_l_P őď ¬¨ A v -> s_sub_id_l_P őď (Cut u v)

  
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)),
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s -> Mu s `‚āú‚äõ Var = Mu s
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v -> Val v `‚āú‚äõ Var = Val v
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (i : őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A),
VarR i `‚āú‚äõ Var = VarR i
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)),
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s -> MuT s `‚āú‚äõ Var = MuT s
forall őď : t_ctx, Boom `‚āú‚äõ Var = Boom
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v ->
forall k : term őď ¬¨ B,
k `‚āú‚äõ Var = k -> App v k `‚āú‚äõ Var = App v k
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (k : term őď ¬¨ A),
k `‚āú‚äõ Var = k -> Fst k `‚āú‚äõ Var = Fst k
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (k : term őď ¬¨ B),
k `‚āú‚äõ Var = k -> Snd k `‚āú‚äõ Var = Snd k
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)),
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s ->
forall t : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B),
t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t -> Case s t `‚āú‚äõ Var = Case s t
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (i : őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ A),
VarL i `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = VarL i
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď A),
v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v -> Inl v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = Inl v
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty) (v : whn őď B),
v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v -> Inr v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = Inr v
forall őď : t_ctx, Tt `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = Tt
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)),
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s -> Lam s `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = Lam s
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A B : pre_ty)
  (s : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)),
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s ->
forall t : state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B),
t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t -> Pair s t `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = Pair s t
forall (őď : t_ctx) (A : pre_ty) (u : term őď ‚ÜĎ A),
u `‚āú‚äõ Var = u ->
forall v : term őď ¬¨ A,
v `‚āú‚äõ Var = v -> Cut u v ‚āú‚äõ Var = Cut u v

  
őď: t_ctx
A: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) s (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) (a_shift1 Var) = s
őď: t_ctx
A: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) s (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) (a_shift1 Var) = s
őď: t_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
t: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B)
H0: t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) s (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A) (a_shift1 Var) = s
őď: t_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
t: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B)
H0: t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B) t (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B) (a_shift1 Var) = t
őď: t_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) s
  (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) (a_shift3 Var) = s
őď: t_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
t: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)
H0: t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) s (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A) (a_shift1 Var) = s
őď: t_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)
H: s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s
t: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)
H0: t ‚āú‚äõ Var = t
s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) t (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B) (a_shift1 Var) = t

  all: first [ rewrite a_shift1_id | rewrite a_shift3_id ]; auto.
Qed.


őď: t_ctx
A: ty
t: term őď A
t `‚āú‚äõ Var = t

  now apply (term_ind_mut _ _ _ sub_id_l_prf).
Qed.

őď: t_ctx
A: pre_ty
v: whn őď A
v `ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v

  now apply (whn_ind_mut _ _ _ sub_id_l_prf).
Qed.

őď: t_ctx
s: state őď
s ‚āú‚äõ Var = s

  now apply (state_ind_mut _ _ _ sub_id_l_prf).
Qed.

őď: t_ctx
A: ty
v: val őď A
v ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v

  
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ‚ÜĎ p
v ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ¬¨ p
v ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v

  
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ‚ÜĎ p
v ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v
 now apply w_sub_id_l.
  
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ¬¨ p
v ŠĶ•‚äõ Var = v
 now apply t_sub_id_l.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
a_shift1 f ‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõ f] ‚Č°‚āź ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõ f

  
őď0: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
a: ty
f: őď0 =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď0 a
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď a) a (Var top) őĒ ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď0 a v őĒ f] =
v_subst őď0 a v őĒ f
őď1: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
y: ty
f: őď1 =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď y) a (v_shift1 a (f a v0)) őĒ
  ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď1 y v őĒ f] = v_subst őď1 a (Var v0) őĒ f

  
őď0: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
a: ty
f: őď0 =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď0 a
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď a) a (Var top) őĒ ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď0 a v őĒ f] =
v_subst őď0 a v őĒ f
 now rewrite v_sub_id_r.
  
őď1: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
y: ty
f: őď1 =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď y) a (v_shift1 a (f a v0)) őĒ
  ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď1 y v őĒ f] = v_subst őď1 a (Var v0) őĒ f
 
őď1: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
y: ty
f: őď1 =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
f a v0 ŠĶ•‚äõ r_pop ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď1 y v őĒ f] = f a v0

    now apply v_sub_id_l.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
r_shift1 f ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] ‚Č°‚āź ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõŠĶ£ f

  
őď1, őĒ: ctx ty
y: ty
f: őď1 ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
(r_shift1 f ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f])%asgn a (pop v0) =
(‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõŠĶ£ f)%asgn a (pop v0)

  cbn; now rewrite v_ren_id_r.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
w: val (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
(w ŠĶ•‚äõ a_shift1 f) ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõ f] = (w ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) ŠĶ•‚äõ f

  
őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
w: val (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
w ŠĶ•‚äõ a_shift1 f ‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď A v őĒ f] =
w ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõ f

  apply v_sub_eq; now rewrite sub1_sub.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A, B: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
w: val (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
w ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_shift1 f ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] = (w ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f

  
őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A, B: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
w: val (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
w ŠĶ•‚äõ r_shift1 f ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] = w ŠĶ•‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõŠĶ£ f

  apply v_sub_eq; now rewrite sub1_ren.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A)
(s ‚āú‚äõ a_shift1 f) ‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõ f] = (s ‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) ‚āú‚äõ f

  cbn; now rewrite 2 s_sub_sub, sub1_sub.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B, C: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A ‚Ė∂‚āď B ‚Ė∂‚āď C)
u: val őď A
v: val őď B
w: val őď C
(s ‚āú‚äõ a_shift3 f) ‚āú‚äõ ‚āÉ[ u ŠĶ•‚äõ f, v ŠĶ•‚äõ f, w ŠĶ•‚äõ f] =
(s ‚āú‚äõ ‚āÉ[ u, v, w]) ‚āú‚äõ f

  
őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B, C: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A ‚Ė∂‚āď B ‚Ė∂‚āď C)
u: val őď A
v: val őď B
w: val őď C
a_shift3 f
‚äõ ‚āÉ[ v_subst őď A u őĒ f, v_subst őď B v őĒ f,
  v_subst őď C w őĒ f] ‚Č°‚āź ‚āÉ[ u, v, w] ‚äõ f

  
őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B, C: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A ‚Ė∂‚āď B ‚Ė∂‚āď C)
u: val őď A
v: val őď B
w: val őď C
a: ty
v0: őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A ‚Ė∂‚āď B ‚Ė∂‚āď C ‚ąč a
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď A ‚Ė∂‚āď B ‚Ė∂‚āď C) a (a_shift3 f a v0) őĒ
  ‚āÉ[ v_subst őď A u őĒ f, v_subst őď B v őĒ f,
  v_subst őď C w őĒ f] =
v_subst őď a (‚āÉ[ u, v, w] a v0) őĒ f

  
őď1: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
y1, y0, y: ty
f: őď1 =[ val ]> őĒ
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď y1 ‚Ė∂‚āď y0 ‚Ė∂‚āď y)
u: val őď1 y1
v: val őď1 y0
w: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
v_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď y1 ‚Ė∂‚āď y0 ‚Ė∂‚āď y) a (v_shift3 a (f a v0)) őĒ
  ‚āÉ[ v_subst őď1 y1 u őĒ f, v_subst őď1 y0 v őĒ f,
  v_subst őď1 y w őĒ f] = v_subst őď1 a (Var v0) őĒ f

  
őď1: ctx ty
őĒ: t_ctx
y1, y0, y: ty
f: őď1 =[ val ]> őĒ
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď y1 ‚Ė∂‚āď y0 ‚Ė∂‚āď y)
u: val őď1 y1
v: val őď1 y0
w: val őď1 y
a: ty
v0: var a őď1
f a v0
ŠĶ•‚äõ ((r_pop ŠĶ£‚äõ r_pop) ŠĶ£‚äõ r_pop)
   ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āÉ[ v_subst őď1 y1 u őĒ f, v_subst őď1 y0 v őĒ f,
      v_subst őď1 y w őĒ f] = f a v0 ŠĶ•‚äõ Var

  now apply v_sub_eq.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A)
s ‚āõ‚äõŠĶ£ r_shift1 f ‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] = (s ‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) ‚āõ‚äõŠĶ£ f

  cbn; now rewrite s_sub_ren, s_ren_sub, sub1_ren.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
t: term (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
(t `‚āú‚äõ a_shift1 f) `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõ f] =
(t `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) `‚āú‚äõ f

  
őď, őĒ: t_ctx
A, B: ty
f: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
v: val őď A
t: term (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
t `‚āú‚äõ a_shift1 f ‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v_subst őď A v őĒ f] =
t `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõ f

  apply t_sub_eq; now rewrite sub1_sub.
Qed.


őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A, B: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
t: term (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
t ‚āú‚äõŠĶ£ r_shift1 f `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] = (t `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v]) ‚āú‚äõŠĶ£ f

  
őď, őĒ: ctx ty
A, B: ty
f: őď ‚äÜ őĒ
v: val őď A
t: term (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď A) B
t `‚āú‚äõ r_shift1 f ŠĶ£‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ f] = t `‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ v] ‚äõŠĶ£ f

  apply t_sub_eq; now rewrite sub1_ren.
Qed.


őď: t_ctx
A: ty
v: val őď A
m: pat A ‚Ä†
Proper (asgn_eq (pat_dom m) őď ==> eq) (p_app v m)

  
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ‚ÜĎ p
m: pat (‚ÜĎ p) ‚Ä†
u1, u2: pat_dom m =[ val ]> őď
H: u1 ‚Č°‚āź u2
Cut (Val v) (m `‚āú‚äõ u1) = Cut (Val v) (m `‚āú‚äõ u2)
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ¬¨ p
m: pat (¬¨ p) ‚Ä†
u1, u2: pat_dom m =[ val ]> őď
H: u1 ‚Č°‚āź u2
Cut (Val (m `ŠĶ•‚äõ u1)) v = Cut (Val (m `ŠĶ•‚äõ u2)) v

  
őď: t_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď ¬¨ p
m: pat (¬¨ p) ‚Ä†
u1, u2: pat_dom m =[ val ]> őď
H: u1 ‚Č°‚āź u2
Cut (Val (m `ŠĶ•‚äõ u1)) v = Cut (Val (m `ŠĶ•‚äõ u2)) v

  now rewrite (w_sub_eq u1 u2 H).
Qed.


őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
v: whn őď A
(p_of_w A v : val (pat_dom (p_of_w A v)) ‚ÜĎ A)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w A v = v

  
őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ `0
p_of_w `0 (VarL i) `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w `0 (VarL i) = VarL i
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (VarL i)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (VarL i) = VarL i
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: whn őď a
H: p_of_w a v `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w a v = v
Heqcall: PInl (p_of_w a v) = p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v) = Inl v
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: whn őď b
H: p_of_w b v `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w b v = v
Heqcall: PInr (p_of_w b v) = p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v) = 
Inr v

  
őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ `0
p_of_w `0 (VarL i) `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w `0 (VarL i) = VarL i
 destruct (s_prf i).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (VarL i)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (VarL i) = VarL i
 destruct (s_prf i).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: whn őď a
H: p_of_w a v `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w a v = v
Heqcall: PInl (p_of_w a v) = p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (Inl v) = Inl v
 now cbn; f_equal. 
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: whn őď b
H: p_of_w b v `ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w b v = v
Heqcall: PInr (p_of_w b v) = p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v)
p_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v)
`ŠĶ•‚äõ p_dom_of_w (a `+ b) (Inr v) = Inr v
 now cbn; f_equal. 
Qed.

Equations p_of_w_eq {őď : neg_ctx} A (p : pat ‚ÜĎA) (e : pat_dom p =[val]> őď)
          : p_of_w A ((p : val _ _) `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) = p :=
  p_of_w_eq (a `+ b) (PInl v) e := f_equal PInl (p_of_w_eq _ v e) ;
  p_of_w_eq (a `+ b) (PInr v) e := f_equal PInr (p_of_w_eq _ v e) ;
  p_of_w_eq (`1)     PTt      e := eq_refl ;
  p_of_w_eq (a `√ó b) PPair    e := eq_refl ;
  p_of_w_eq (a `‚Üí b) PLam     e := eq_refl .


őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
e: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ A => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq A p e in
p_dom_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e

  
őď: neg_ctx
e: pat_dom PTt =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq `1 PTt e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ `1 top ‚Č°‚āź e
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
e: pat_dom PPair =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq (a `√ó b) PPair e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ (a `√ó b) top ‚Č°‚āź e
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a
e: pat_dom (PInl v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq a v e in 
p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInl (p_of_w_eq a v e) in
p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ b
e: pat_dom (PInr v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ b => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq b v e in 
p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInr (p_of_w_eq b v e) in
p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
e: pat_dom PLam =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq (a `‚Üí b) PLam e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ (a `‚Üí b) top ‚Č°‚āź e

  
őď: neg_ctx
e: pat_dom PTt =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq `1 PTt e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ `1 top ‚Č°‚āź e
 intros ? v; repeat (dependent elimination v; auto).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
e: pat_dom PPair =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq (a `√ó b) PPair e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ (a `√ó b) top ‚Č°‚āź e
 intros ? v; repeat (dependent elimination v; auto).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a
e: pat_dom (PInl v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq a v e in p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInl (p_of_w_eq a v e) in
p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
 
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a
e: pat_dom (PInl v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq a v e in p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
xx:= rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) =>
     pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInl (p_of_w_eq a v e) in
p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e): (fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď)
  (PInl v)
xx ‚Č°‚āź e

    
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a
e: pat_dom (PInl v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq a v e in p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
xx': (fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď) (PInl v)
Heqxx': xx' =
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) =>
     pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInl (p_of_w_eq a v e) in
p_dom_of_w a (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e)
xx' ‚Č°‚āź e

    now rewrite (eq_trans Heqxx' (eq_sym (rew_map _ PInl _ _))).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ b
e: pat_dom (PInr v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ b => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq b v e in p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInr (p_of_w_eq b v e) in
p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
 
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ b
e: pat_dom (PInr v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ b => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq b v e in p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
xx:= rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) =>
     pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInr (p_of_w_eq b v e) in
p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e): (fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď)
  (PInr v)
xx ‚Č°‚āź e

    
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ b
e: pat_dom (PInr v) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ b => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq b v e in p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e) ‚Č°‚āź e
xx': (fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď) (PInr v)
Heqxx': xx' =
rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ (a `+ b) =>
     pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    f_equal PInr (p_of_w_eq b v e) in
p_dom_of_w b (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ e)
xx' ‚Č°‚āź e

    now rewrite (eq_trans Heqxx' (eq_sym (rew_map _ PInr _ _))).
  
őď: neg_ctx
a, b: pre_ty
e: pat_dom PLam =[ val ]> őď
Heqcall: eq_refl = p_of_w_eq (a `‚Üí b) PLam e
! ‚Ė∂‚āź e ‚ÜĎ (a `‚Üí b) top ‚Č°‚āź e
 intros ? v; repeat (dependent elimination v; auto).
Qed.

Notation val_n := (val ‚ąė neg_c_coe).
Notation state_n := (state ‚ąė neg_c_coe).


subst_monoid val_n

  
c_var ‚áí‚āĀ val_n
val_n ‚áí‚āĀ (‚ü¶ val_n, val_n ‚üß‚āĀ)

  
c_var ‚áí‚āĀ val_n
 intros őď x i; exact (Var i).
  
val_n ‚áí‚āĀ (‚ü¶ val_n, val_n ‚üß‚āĀ)
 intros őď x v őĒ f; exact (v ŠĶ•‚äõ f).
Defined.


subst_module val_n state_n

  esplit; intros őď s őĒ f; exact (s ‚āú‚äõ (f : őď =[val]> őĒ)).
Defined.


subst_monoid_laws val_n

  
Proper
  (‚ąÄ‚āē őď, (‚ąÄ‚āē a, eq ==> (‚ąÄ‚āē őĒ, asgn_eq őď őĒ ==> eq)))
  v_sub
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (i : őď1 ‚ąč x)
  (p : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2), a_id i ŠĶ•‚äõ p = p x i
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x),
v ŠĶ•‚äõ a_id = v
forall (őď1 őď2 őď3 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (a : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2) (b : őď2 =[ val_n ]> őď3),
v ŠĶ•‚äõ a ‚äõ b = (v ŠĶ•‚äõ a) ŠĶ•‚äõ b

  
Proper
  (‚ąÄ‚āē őď, (‚ąÄ‚āē a, eq ==> (‚ąÄ‚āē őĒ, asgn_eq őď őĒ ==> eq)))
  v_sub
 intros ???? <- ????; now apply v_sub_eq.
  
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (i : őď1 ‚ąč x)
  (p : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2), a_id i ŠĶ•‚äõ p = p x i
 intros ?????; now apply v_sub_id_r.
  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x),
v ŠĶ•‚äõ a_id = v
 intros ???; now apply v_sub_id_l.
  
forall (őď1 őď2 őď3 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (a : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2) (b : őď2 =[ val_n ]> őď3),
v ŠĶ•‚äõ a ‚äõ b = (v ŠĶ•‚äõ a) ŠĶ•‚äõ b
 intros ???????; symmetry; now apply v_sub_sub.
Qed.


subst_module_laws val_n state_n

  
Proper (‚ąÄ‚āē őď, eq ==> (‚ąÄ‚āē őĒ, asgn_eq őď őĒ ==> eq)) c_sub
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (c : state őď), c ‚āú‚äõ a_id = c
forall (őď1 őď2 őď3 : neg_ctx) (c : state őď1)
  (a : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2) (b : őď2 =[ val_n ]> őď3),
c ‚āú‚äõ a ‚äõ b = (c ‚āú‚äõ a) ‚āú‚äõ b

  
Proper (‚ąÄ‚āē őď, eq ==> (‚ąÄ‚āē őĒ, asgn_eq őď őĒ ==> eq)) c_sub
 intros ??? <- ????; now apply s_sub_eq.
  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (c : state őď), c ‚āú‚äõ a_id = c
 intros ??; now apply s_sub_id_l.
  
forall (őď1 őď2 őď3 : neg_ctx) (c : state őď1)
  (a : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2) (b : őď2 =[ val_n ]> őď3),
c ‚āú‚äõ a ‚äõ b = (c ‚āú‚äõ a) ‚āú‚äõ b
 intros ??????; symmetry; now apply s_sub_sub.
Qed.


var_assumptions val_n

  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty), injective (a_id (x:=x))
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x),
decidable (is_var v)
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (r : őď1 ‚äÜ őď2), is_var (v_ren v r) -> is_var v

  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty), injective (a_id (x:=x))
 intros ? [] ?? H; now dependent destruction H.
  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x),
decidable (is_var v)
 
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
c: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ A
decidable (is_var (VarL c))
őď: neg_ctx
A0, B: pre_ty
w: whn őď A0
decidable (is_var (Inl w))
őď: neg_ctx
A1, B0: pre_ty
w0: whn őď B0
decidable (is_var (Inr w0))
őď: neg_ctx
decidable (is_var Tt)
őď: neg_ctx
A2, B1: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A2)
s0: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B1)
decidable (is_var (Pair s s0))
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B2: pre_ty
s1: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B2) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B2)
decidable (is_var (Lam s1))
őď: neg_ctx
A1: pre_ty
c: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A1
decidable (is_var (VarR c))
őď: neg_ctx
A2: pre_ty
s0: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A2)
decidable (is_var (MuT s0))
őď: neg_ctx
decidable (is_var Boom)
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B: pre_ty
s1: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3)
s2: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B)
decidable (is_var (Case s1 s2))
őď: neg_ctx
A4, B0: pre_ty
t: term őď ¬¨ A4
decidable (is_var (Fst t))
őď: neg_ctx
A5, B1: pre_ty
t0: term őď ¬¨ B1
decidable (is_var (Snd t0))
őď: neg_ctx
A6, B2: pre_ty
w0: whn őď A6
t1: term őď ¬¨ B2
decidable (is_var (App w0 t1))

    
őď: neg_ctx
A0, B: pre_ty
w: whn őď A0
decidable (is_var (Inl w))
őď: neg_ctx
A1, B0: pre_ty
w0: whn őď B0
decidable (is_var (Inr w0))
őď: neg_ctx
decidable (is_var Tt)
őď: neg_ctx
A2, B1: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A2)
s0: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B1)
decidable (is_var (Pair s s0))
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B2: pre_ty
s1: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B2) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B2)
decidable (is_var (Lam s1))
őď: neg_ctx
A2: pre_ty
s0: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A2)
decidable (is_var (MuT s0))
őď: neg_ctx
decidable (is_var Boom)
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B: pre_ty
s1: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3)
s2: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B)
decidable (is_var (Case s1 s2))
őď: neg_ctx
A4, B0: pre_ty
t: term őď ¬¨ A4
decidable (is_var (Fst t))
őď: neg_ctx
A5, B1: pre_ty
t0: term őď ¬¨ B1
decidable (is_var (Snd t0))
őď: neg_ctx
A6, B2: pre_ty
w0: whn őď A6
t1: term őď ¬¨ B2
decidable (is_var (App w0 t1))

    all: apply No; intro H; dependent destruction H.
  
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (r : őď1 ‚äÜ őď2), is_var (v_ren v r) -> is_var v
 
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
c: őď1 ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ A
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (VarL c) r)
is_var (VarL c)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
v: whn őď1 A
IHv: forall (őď3 : neg_ctx) (v0 : whn őď3 A),
őď1 ~= őď3 -> v ~= v0 -> forall r : őď3 ‚äÜ őď2, is_var (v_ren v0 r) -> is_var v0
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Inl v) r)
is_var (Inl v)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
v: whn őď1 B
IHv: forall (őď3 : neg_ctx) (v0 : whn őď3 B),
őď1 ~= őď3 -> v ~= v0 -> forall r : őď3 ‚äÜ őď2, is_var (v_ren v0 r) -> is_var v0
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Inr v) r)
is_var (Inr v)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren Tt r)
is_var Tt
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A)
s0: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Pair s s0) r)
is_var (Pair s s0)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A `‚Üí B) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B)
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Lam s) r)
is_var (Lam s)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
p: pre_ty
c: őď1 ‚ąč ¬¨ p
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (VarR c) r)
is_var (VarR c)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
p: pre_ty
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ p)
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (MuT s) r)
is_var (MuT s)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren Boom r)
is_var Boom
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
s: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A)
s0: state (őď1 ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ B)
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Case s s0) r)
is_var (Case s s0)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
v: term őď1 ¬¨ A
IHv: forall (őď3 : neg_ctx) (p : pre_ty) (v0 : term őď3 ¬¨ p),
őď1 ~= őď3 ->
¬¨ A = ¬¨ p -> v ~= v0 -> forall r : őď3 ‚äÜ őď2, is_var (v_ren v0 r) -> is_var v0
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Fst v) r)
is_var (Fst v)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
v: term őď1 ¬¨ B
IHv: forall (őď3 : neg_ctx) (p : pre_ty) (v0 : term őď3 ¬¨ p),
őď1 ~= őď3 ->
¬¨ B = ¬¨ p -> v ~= v0 -> forall r : őď3 ‚äÜ őď2, is_var (v_ren v0 r) -> is_var v0
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (Snd v) r)
is_var (Snd v)
őď2, őď1: neg_ctx
A, B: pre_ty
w: whn őď1 A
v: term őď1 ¬¨ B
IHv: forall (őď3 : neg_ctx) (p : pre_ty) (v0 : term őď3 ¬¨ p),
őď1 ~= őď3 ->
¬¨ B = ¬¨ p -> v ~= v0 -> forall r : őď3 ‚äÜ őď2, is_var (v_ren v0 r) -> is_var v0
r: őď1 ‚äÜ őď2
X: is_var (v_ren (App w v) r)
is_var (App w v)

    all: try now dependent destruction X; exact (Vvar _).
    all: dependent induction w; dependent destruction X; exact (Vvar _).
Qed.

#[global] Instance sysl_machine : machine val_n state_n op_copat :=
  {| Machine.eval := @eval ; oapp := @p_app |} .

From Coinduction Require Import coinduction lattice rel tactics.

Ltac refold_eval :=
  change (Structure.iter _ _ ?a) with (eval a);
  change (Structure.subst (fun pat : T1 => let 'T1_0 := pat in ?f) T1_0 ?u)
    with (bind_delay' u f).

Definition upg_v {őď} {A : pre_ty} : whn őď A  -> val őď ‚ÜĎA := fun v => v.
Definition upg_k {őď} {A : pre_ty} : term őď ¬¨A -> val őď ¬¨A := fun v => v.
Definition dwn_v {őď} {A : pre_ty} : val őď ‚ÜĎA -> whn őď A  := fun v => v.
Definition dwn_k {őď} {A : pre_ty} : val őď ¬¨A -> term őď ¬¨A := fun v => v.


őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
nf_eq
  (i
   ‚čÖ w_split A
       (dwn_v ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)))
  (i ‚čÖ (p : op_copat ¬¨ A) ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
nf_eq
  (i ‚čÖ p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶á p_dom_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶ą)
  (i ‚čÖ p ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ A => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq A p ő≥ in
p_dom_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)
‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq
  (i ‚čÖ p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶á p_dom_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶ą)
  (i ‚čÖ p ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
H':= p_of_w_eq A p ő≥: p_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) = p
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ A => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in
p_dom_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)
‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq
  (i ‚čÖ p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶á p_dom_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶ą)
  (i ‚čÖ p ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
H':= p_of_w_eq A p ő≥: p_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) = p
a:= p_dom_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥): pat_dom (p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ A => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in a ‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq (i ‚čÖ p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶á a ‚¶ą) (i ‚čÖ p ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  
őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A
p: pat ‚ÜĎ A
ő≥: pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď
H':= p_of_w_eq A p ő≥: p_of_w A ((p : val (pat_dom p) ‚ÜĎ A) `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) = p
a': pat_dom (p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)) =[ val ]> őď
H: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ A => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in a' ‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq (i ‚čÖ p_of_w A (p `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) ‚¶á a' ‚¶ą) (i ‚čÖ p ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

  revert a' H; rewrite H'; intros; now econstructor.
Qed.


machine_laws val_n state_n op_copat

  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x)
  (o : op_copat x),
Proper (asgn_eq (dom o) őď ==> eq) (oapp v o)
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (o : op_copat x) (a : dom o =[ val_n ]> őď1)
  (b : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2),
v ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė ‚āú‚äõ b = (v ŠĶ•‚äõ b) ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚äõ b ‚¶ė
forall (őď őĒ : neg_ctx) (c : state őď)
  (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
Machine.eval (c ‚āú‚äõ a)
‚Čč bind_delay' (Machine.eval c)
    (fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
     Machine.eval (emb n ‚āú‚äõ a))
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (u : nf op_copat val_n őď),
Machine.eval (emb u) ‚Čč ret_delay u
well_founded head_inst_nostep

  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď x)
  (o : op_copat x),
Proper (asgn_eq (dom o) őď ==> eq) (oapp v o)
 intros; apply p_app_eq.
  
forall (őď1 őď2 : neg_ctx) (x : ty) (v : val őď1 x)
  (o : op_copat x) (a : dom o =[ val_n ]> őď1)
  (b : őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2),
v ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė ‚āú‚äõ b = (v ŠĶ•‚äõ b) ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚äõ b ‚¶ė
 
őď1, őď2: neg_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď1 ‚ÜĎ p
o: op_copat ‚ÜĎ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď1
b: őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2
Cut (Val (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ b)) ((o `‚āú‚äõ a) `‚āú‚äõ b) =
Cut (Val (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ b)) (o `‚āú‚äõ a ‚äõ b)
őď1, őď2: neg_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď1 ¬¨ p
o: op_copat ¬¨ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď1
b: őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2
Cut (Val ((o `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) `ŠĶ•‚äõ b)) (v `‚āú‚äõ b) =
Cut (Val (o `ŠĶ•‚äõ a ‚äõ b)) (v `‚āú‚äõ b)

    
őď1, őď2: neg_ctx
p: pre_ty
v: val őď1 ¬¨ p
o: op_copat ¬¨ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď1
b: őď1 =[ val_n ]> őď2
Cut (Val ((o `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) `ŠĶ•‚äõ b)) (v `‚āú‚äõ b) =
Cut (Val (o `ŠĶ•‚äõ a ‚äõ b)) (v `‚āú‚äõ b)

    now rewrite (w_sub_sub _ _ _ _).
  
forall (őď őĒ : neg_ctx) (c : state őď)
  (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
Machine.eval (c ‚āú‚äõ a)
‚Čč bind_delay' (Machine.eval c)
    (fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
     Machine.eval (emb n ‚āú‚äõ a))
 
őď, őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
c: state őď
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_bt ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
  (bind_delay' (eval c)
     (fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n)
              (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))

    
őď: neg_ctx
A2: pre_ty
v: whn őď A2
i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ A2
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eqF ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux (s_subst őď (Cut (Val v) (VarR i)) őĒ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state őĒ ->
                itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
             fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match eval_aux (Cut (Val v) (VarR i)) with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state őď ->
                  itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state őď) +ŠĶĘ
                     (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őď)) x0) in
               fun c : state őď => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst őď
             (p_app (Var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) őĒ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state őĒ ->
                    itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                       (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< k r)
  end
őď: neg_ctx
A3: pre_ty
v: whn őď A3
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3)
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>

            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat

                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in

           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state őĒ ->
                itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
             fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match eval_aux (Cut (Val v) (MuT s)) with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state őď ->
                  itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state őď) +ŠĶĘ
                     (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őď)) x0) in
               fun c : state őď => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst őď
             (p_app (Var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) őĒ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state őĒ ->
                    itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                       (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< k r)
  end

  (eval
     (s_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3)
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3) s (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3)
           (a_shift1 a)) őĒ ‚āĀ[ v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a]))
  (bind_delay' (eval (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3) s őď ‚āĀ[ v]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst őď
             (p_app (Var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) őĒ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state őĒ ->
                    itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                       (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 now change (it_eqF _ ?RX ?RY _ _ _) with
        (it_eq_map ‚ąÖ‚āĎ RX RY T1_0
           (eval (Cut (a _ i) (Fst k `‚āú‚äõ a)))
           (eval (Cut (a _ i) (Fst k `‚āú‚äõ a)))).

                  itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state őď) +ŠĶĘ
                     (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őď)) x0) in
               fun c : state őď => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst őď
             (p_app (Var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) őĒ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state őĒ ->
                    itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                       (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
őď: neg_ctx
A7, B2: pre_ty
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (A7 `‚Üí B2)
v: whn őď A7
k: term őď ¬¨ B2
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eqF ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst őď (Cut (Val (VarL i)) (App v k)) őĒ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state őĒ ->
                itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
             fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    eval_aux
      (s_subst őď
         (p_app (Var (nf_var (app_nf i v k)))
            (nf_obs (app_nf i v k))
            (nf_args (app_nf i v k))) őĒ a)
  with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state őĒ ->
                itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
             fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end

  match

      (s_subst őď
         (Cut' (Var i)
            (PApp (p_of_w A7 v)
             `‚āú‚äõ (p_dom_of_w A7 v ‚Ė∂‚āź k))) őĒ a)

     (eval
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s
           őď ‚āÉ[ Lam s, v, k]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

      
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B3: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
v: whn őď A3
k: term őď ¬¨ B3
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s
           (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
           (a_shift3 a)) őĒ
        ‚āÉ[ upg_v (Lam s) ŠĶ•‚äõ a, v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a, upg_k k ŠĶ•‚äõ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s
           őď ‚āÉ[ Lam s, v, k]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
v: whn őď A3
k: term őď ¬¨ B3
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s
           (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
           (a_shift3 a)) őĒ
        ‚āÉ[ upg_v (Lam s) ŠĶ•‚äõ a, upg_v v ŠĶ•‚äõ a,
        upg_k k ŠĶ•‚äõ a]))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s

           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

      
őď: neg_ctx
A3, B3: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
v: whn őď A3
k: term őď ¬¨ B3
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     ((s ‚āú‚äõ ‚āÉ[ upg_v (Lam s), upg_v v, upg_k k]) ‚āú‚äõ a))
  (bind_delay'
     (eval
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3) s
           őď ‚āÉ[ Lam s, v, k]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

      apply CIH.
    
őď: neg_ctx
A1: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1)
k: term őď ¬¨ A1
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eqF ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq)
  (it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R) T1_0
  match eval_aux (s_subst őď (Cut (Mu s) k) őĒ a) with
  | inl x =>
      TauF
        (iter
           (fun pat : T1 =>
            let
            'T1_0 as x0 := pat
             return
               (state őĒ ->
                itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                  ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                   (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
             fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
           T1_0 x)
  | inr y => RetF y
  end
  match
    match eval_aux (Cut (Mu s) k) with
    | inl x =>
        TauF
          (iter
             (fun pat : T1 =>
              let
              'T1_0 as x0 := pat
               return
                 (state őď ->
                  itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                    ((fun _ : T1 => state őď) +ŠĶĘ
                     (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őď)) x0) in
               fun c : state őď => Ret' (eval_aux c))
             T1_0 x)
    | inr y => RetF y
    end
  with
  | RetF r =>
      match
        eval_aux
          (s_subst őď
             (p_app (Var (nf_var r)) (nf_obs r)
                (nf_args r)) őĒ a)
      with
      | inl x =>
          TauF
            (iter
               (fun pat : T1 =>
                let
                'T1_0 as x0 := pat
                 return
                   (state őĒ ->
                    itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                      ((fun _ : T1 => state őĒ) +ŠĶĘ
                       (fun _ : T1 => L_nf őĒ)) x0) in
                 fun c : state őĒ => Ret' (eval_aux c))
               T1_0 x)
      | inr y => RetF y
      end
  | TauF t =>
      TauF
        ((fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< t)
  | VisF e k =>
      VisF e
        (fun r : ex_falso e =>
         (fun pat : T1 =>
          let
          'T1_0 as x := pat
           return
             (nf op_copat val_n őď ->
              itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ
                (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ) x)
           in
           fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
           eval
             (s_subst őď
                (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
                   (nf_args y)) őĒ a)) =<< k r)
  end
 
őď: neg_ctx
A1: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1)
k: term őď ¬¨ A1
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval
     (s_subst (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1)
        (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1) s (őĒ ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1)
           (a_shift1 a)) őĒ ‚āĀ[ k `‚āú‚äõ a]))
  (bind_delay' (eval (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1) s őď ‚āĀ[ k]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

      
őď: neg_ctx
A1: pre_ty
s: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1)
k: term őď ¬¨ A1
őĒ: neg_ctx
R: relŠĶĘ
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
  (itree ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf op_copat val_n őĒ))
CIH: forall (c : state őď) (a : őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ),
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0 (eval (s_subst őď c őĒ a))
(bind_delay' (eval c)
(fun n : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
eval (s_subst őď (p_app (Var (nf_var n)) (nf_obs n) (nf_args n)) őĒ a)))
a: őď =[ val_n ]> őĒ
it_eq_t ‚ąÖ‚āĎ (fun _ : T1 => nf_eq) R T1_0
  (eval ((s ‚āú‚äõ ‚āĀ[ upg_k k]) ‚āú‚äõ a))
  (bind_delay' (eval (s_subst (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A1) s őď ‚āĀ[ k]))
     (fun y : nf op_copat val_n őď =>
      eval
        (s_subst őď
           (p_app (Var (nf_var y)) (nf_obs y)
              (nf_args y)) őĒ a)))

      apply CIH.
  
forall (őď : neg_ctx) (u : nf op_copat val_n őď),
Machine.eval (emb u) ‚Čč ret_delay u
 
őď: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: őď ‚ąč A
o: op_copat A
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eval (Cut' (Var i) (o `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

    
őď: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: őď ‚ąč A
o: pat A ‚Ä†
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eqargs: {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ `1; pr2 := PTt |} =
{| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}
H0: ‚ÜĎ `1 = A ‚Ä†
H1: ‚ÜĎ `1,' PTt = A ‚Ä†,' o
eval
  (Cut' (Var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A : ty => pat A) =>
           val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in VarL Ctx.top `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
a, b: pre_ty
őď: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: őď ‚ąč A
o: pat A ‚Ä†
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eqargs: {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ (a `√ó b); pr2 := PPair |} =
{| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}
H0: ‚ÜĎ (a `√ó b) = A ‚Ä†
H1: ‚ÜĎ (a `√ó b),' PPair = A ‚Ä†,' o
eval
  (Cut' (Var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A : ty => pat A) =>
           val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in VarL Ctx.top `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
a0, b0: pre_ty
u: pat ‚ÜĎ a0
H: forall (őď : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : őď ‚ąč A) (o : pat A ‚Ä†)
  (ő≥ : dom o =[ val_n ]> őď)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ a0; pr2 := u |} =
            {| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A0 : ty => pat A0) =>
     val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in u = o ->
eval (Cut' (Var i) (o `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
őď: neg_ctx

i: őď ‚ąč A
o: pat A ‚Ä†
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eqargs: {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ (a0 `+ b0); pr2 := PInl u |} =
{| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}
H1: ‚ÜĎ (a0 `+ b0) = A ‚Ä†
H2: ‚ÜĎ (a0 `+ b0),' PInl u = A ‚Ä†,' o
eval
  (Cut' (Var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A : ty => pat A) =>
           val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in Inl u `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A0 : ty => pat A0) =>
     val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in u = o ->
eval (Cut' (Var i) (o `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A : ty => pat A) =>

v: pat ‚ÜĎ a5
H: forall (őď : neg_ctx) (A : ty) 
  (i : őď ‚ąč A) (o : pat A ‚Ä†)
  (ő≥ : dom o =[ val_n ]> őď)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ a5; pr2 := v |} =
            {| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A0 : ty => pat A0) =>
     val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in v = o ->

‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
őď: neg_ctx
A: ty
i: őď ‚ąč A
o: pat A ‚Ä†
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eqargs: {| pr1 := ¬¨ (a5 `‚Üí b5); pr2 := PApp v |} =
{| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}
H1: ¬¨ (a5 `‚Üí b5) = A ‚Ä†
H2: ¬¨ (a5 `‚Üí b5),' PApp v = A ‚Ä†,' o
eval
  (Cut' (Var i)
     (rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A : ty => pat A) =>
           val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
          eqargs in App (v `ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_pop) (VarR Ctx.top)
      `‚āú‚äõ ő≥)) ‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

i: őď ‚ąč ¬¨ `1
o: pat (¬¨ `1) ‚Ä†
ő≥: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
eqargs: {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ `1; pr2 := PTt |} =

           val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]

  (s_var_upg i ‚čÖ w_split (a1 `+ b1) (Inr (u `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)))
  (i ‚čÖ PInr u ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
a5, b5: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a5
H: forall (őď : neg_ctx) (A : ty) (i : őď ‚ąč A)
  (o : pat A ‚Ä†) (ő≥ : dom o =[ val_n ]> őď)
  (eqargs : {| pr1 := ‚ÜĎ a5; pr2 := v |} =
            {| pr1 := A ‚Ä†; pr2 := o |}),
rew [fun projs : sigma (fun A0 : ty => pat A0) =>
     val (pat_dom (pr2 projs)) (pr1 projs)]
    eqargs in v = o ->
eval (Cut' (Var i) (o `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a5 `‚Üí b5)
ő≥: dom (PApp v) =[ val_n ]> őď
H2: ¬¨ (a5 `‚Üí b5),' PApp v = (‚ÜĎ (a5 `‚Üí b5)) ‚Ä†,' PApp v
nf_eq (app_nf i (v `ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_pop `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) (ő≥ ¬¨ b5 Ctx.top))
  (i ‚čÖ PApp v ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

v: pat ‚ÜĎ a5
H: forall (őď : neg_ctx) (A : ty) (i : őď ‚ąč A)

    eqargs in v = o ->
eval (Cut' (Var i) (o `‚āú‚äõ ő≥))
‚Čč ret_delay (i ‚čÖ o ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)
őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a5 `‚Üí b5)

nf_eq (app_nf i (v `ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_pop `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥) (ő≥ ¬¨ b5 Ctx.top))
  (i ‚čÖ PApp v ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

    (* a bit of an ugly case because we didn't write proper generic functions
       for splitting negative values.. hence knowing this one is an App is
       getting in our way *)
    
a5, b5: pre_ty

őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a5 `‚Üí b5)
ő≥: dom (PApp v) =[ val_n ]> őď
nf_eq
  (i
   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_pop `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥))
     ‚¶á p_dom_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõŠĶ£ r_pop `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥)
       ‚Ė∂‚āź ő≥ ¬¨ b5 Ctx.top ‚¶ą) (i ‚čÖ PApp v ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

vv:= ő≥ ¬¨ b5 Ctx.top: term őď ¬¨ b5

   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥'))

H: ő≥' ‚Ė∂‚āź upg_k vv ‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq
  (i
   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ ő≥'))

ő≥: dom (PApp v) =[ val_n ]> őď
a: pat_dom v =[ val ]> őď
t: term őď ¬¨ b5
H: a ‚Ė∂‚āź upg_k t ‚Č°‚āź ő≥
nf_eq
  (i
   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a))
     ‚¶á p_dom_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚¶ą)

a5, b5: pre_ty

őď: neg_ctx

a: pat_dom v =[ val ]> őď
t: term őď ¬¨ b5
H: a ‚Ė∂‚āź upg_k t ‚Č°‚āź ő≥
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    p_of_w_eq a5 v a in
p_dom_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)
‚Č°‚āź a
nf_eq
  (i
   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a))
     ‚¶á p_dom_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚¶ą)

t: term őď ¬¨ b5

H':= p_of_w_eq a5 v a: p_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) = v
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in
p_dom_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)
‚Č°‚āź a

  (i
   ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a))

őď: neg_ctx

H':= p_of_w_eq a5 v a: p_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) = v
aa:= p_dom_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a): pat_dom
  (p_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)) =[
val ]> őď
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in aa ‚Č°‚āź a
nf_eq (i ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)) ‚¶á aa ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚¶ą)
  (i ‚čÖ PApp v ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

    
a5, b5: pre_ty

őď: neg_ctx

ő≥: dom (PApp v) =[ val_n ]> őď

t: term őď ¬¨ b5

a': pat_dom
  (p_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)) =[
val ]> őď
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    H' in a' ‚Č°‚āź a
nf_eq (i ‚čÖ PApp (p_of_w a5 (v `ŠĶ•‚äõ a)) ‚¶á a' ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚¶ą)
  (i ‚čÖ PApp v ‚¶á ő≥ ‚¶ą)

    
a5, b5: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a5
őď: neg_ctx

a': pat_dom v =[ val ]> őď
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    eq_refl in a' ‚Č°‚āź a
a' ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚Č°‚āź ő≥

    
a5, b5: pre_ty
v: pat ‚ÜĎ a5
őď: neg_ctx
i: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (a5 `‚Üí b5)
ő≥: dom (PApp v) =[ val_n ]> őď

t: term őď ¬¨ b5

H':= p_of_w_eq a5 v a: p_of_w a5 ((v : val (pat_dom v) ‚ÜĎ a5) `ŠĶ•‚äõ a) = v
a': pat_dom v =[ val ]> őď
H0: rew [fun p : pat ‚ÜĎ a5 => pat_dom p =[ val ]> őď]
    eq_refl in a' ‚Č°‚āź a
a' ‚Ė∂‚āź t ‚Č°‚āź a ‚Ė∂‚āź upg_k t

    refine (a_append_eq _ _ _ _ _ _); auto.
  
well_founded head_inst_nostep
 
y: ty
o: op_copat y
B: ty
m: op_copat B
őď: neg_ctx
v: val_n őď y
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
i: őď ‚ąč B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: eval‚āí (v ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė) ‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

    
p: pre_ty
o: op_copat ‚ÜĎ p
B: ty
m: op_copat B
őď: neg_ctx
v: val őď ‚ÜĎ p
a: dom o =[ val_n ]> őď
i: őď ‚ąč B
t0: is_var v -> T0
i0: eval‚āí (v ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė) ‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

B: ty
m: op_copat B

v: val őď ¬¨ p

i: őď ‚ąč B

i0: eval‚āí (v ‚äô o ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė) ‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ m)
Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

    
A0, B0: pre_ty
o: op_copat ‚ÜĎ (A0 `+ B0)
B: ty
m: op_copat B

w: whn őď A0

i: őď ‚ąč B
t0: is_var (Inl w) -> T0

Acc head_inst_nostep (B,' m)

o: op_copat ‚ÜĎ (A1 `+ B1)
B: ty

s0: state (őď ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B2)

i: őď ‚ąč B

B: ty

t0: is_var (Pair s s0) -> T0
i0: eval‚āí (Pair s s0 ‚äô PFst ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė)
‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ projT2 (t,' o))
Acc head_inst_nostep (t,' o)
A2, B2: pre_ty
őď: neg_ctx
t2: term őď ¬¨ B2
c: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (A2 `√ó B2)
t: ty
o: pat t ‚Ä†
őď0: neg_ctx
s: state (őď0 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ A2)
s0: state (őď0 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B2)
a: dom PSnd =[ val_n ]> őď0
i: őď0 ‚ąč projT1 (t,' o)
t0: is_var (Pair s s0) -> T0
i0: eval‚āí (Pair s s0 ‚äô PSnd ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė)
‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ projT2 (t,' o))
Acc head_inst_nostep (t,' o)
A3, B3: pre_ty
őď: neg_ctx
w0: whn őď A3
t3: term őď ¬¨ B3
c: őď ‚ąč ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3)
t: ty
o: pat t ‚Ä†
őď0: neg_ctx
s1: state (őď0 ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ (A3 `‚Üí B3) ‚Ė∂‚āď ‚ÜĎ A3 ‚Ė∂‚āď ¬¨ B3)
a: dom (PApp (p_of_w A3 w0)) =[ val_n ]> őď0
i: őď0 ‚ąč projT1 (t,' o)
t0: is_var (Lam s1) -> T0
i0: eval‚āí (Lam s1 ‚äô PApp (p_of_w A3 w0) ‚¶ó a ‚¶ė)
‚Čä ret_delay (i ‚čÖ projT2 (t,' o))
Acc head_inst_nostep (t,' o)

    all: apply it_eq_step in i0; cbn in i0; now inversion i0.
Qed.

Definition subst_eq (őĒ : neg_ctx) {őď} : relation (state őď) :=
  fun u v => forall (ŌÉ : őď =[val]> őĒ), eval‚āí (u ‚āú‚äõ ŌÉ : state_n őĒ) ‚Čą eval‚āí (v ‚āú‚äõ ŌÉ : state_n őĒ) .
Notation "x ‚Čą‚ü¶sub őĒ ‚üß‚Čą y" := (subst_eq őĒ x y) (at level 50).


őĒ, őď: neg_ctx
x, y: state őď
x ‚Čą‚ü¶ogs őĒ ‚üß‚Čą y -> x ‚Čą‚ü¶sub őĒ ‚üß‚Čą y

  exact (ogs_correction _ x y).
Qed.

Definition c_of_t {őď : neg_ctx} {A} (t : term őď ‚ÜĎA)
           : state_n (őď ‚Ė∂‚āõ {| sub_elt := ¬¨A ; sub_prf := stt |}) :=
  Cut (t_shift1 _ t) (VarR Ctx.top) .
Notation "'name‚Āļ'" := c_of_t.

Definition a_of_sk {őď őĒ : neg_ctx} {A} (s : őď =[val]> őĒ) (k : term őĒ ¬¨A)
  : (őď ‚Ė∂‚āõ {| sub_elt := ¬¨A ; sub_prf := stt |}) =[val_n]> őĒ :=
  [ s ,‚āď k : val _ ¬¨_ ].


őď, őĒ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
t: term őď ‚ÜĎ A
s: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
k: term őĒ ¬¨ A
Cut (t `‚āú‚äõ s) k = name‚Āļ t ‚āú‚äõ a_of_sk s k


őď, őĒ: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
t: term őď ‚ÜĎ A
s: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
k: term őĒ ¬¨ A
Cut (t `‚āú‚äõ s) k = name‚Āļ t ‚āú‚äõ a_of_sk s k

  cbn; f_equal; unfold t_shift1; rewrite t_sub_ren; now apply t_sub_eq.
Qed.

Definition ciu_eq (őĒ : neg_ctx) {őď A} : relation (term őď ‚ÜĎA) :=
  fun u v =>
    forall (ŌÉ : őď =[val]> őĒ) (k : term őĒ ¬¨A),
      eval‚āí (Cut (u `‚āú‚äõ ŌÉ) k : state_n őĒ) ‚Čą eval‚āí (Cut (v `‚āú‚äõ ŌÉ) k : state_n őĒ) .
Notation "x ‚Čą‚ü¶ciu őĒ ‚üß‚Āļ‚Čą y" := (ciu_eq őĒ x y) (at level 50).


őĒ, őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
x, y: term őď ‚ÜĎ A
name‚Āļ x ‚Čą‚ü¶ogs őĒ ‚üß‚Čą name‚Āļ y -> x ‚Čą‚ü¶ciu őĒ ‚üß‚Āļ‚Čą y

  
őĒ, őď: neg_ctx
A: pre_ty
x, y: term őď ‚ÜĎ A
H: name‚Āļ x ‚Čą‚ü¶ogs őĒ ‚üß‚Čą name‚Āļ y
ŌÉ: őď =[ val ]> őĒ
k: term őĒ ¬¨ A
eval‚āí (name‚Āļ x ‚āú‚äõ a_of_sk ŌÉ k)
‚Čą eval‚āí (name‚Āļ y ‚āú‚äõ a_of_sk ŌÉ k)

  now apply subst_correct.
Qed.
